text.title: help-documentation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for help-documentation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Help content not maintained after feature changes.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Outdated screenshots and broken step sequences are worse than no documentation; they waste user time and erode trust.

failure-mode.description: Documentation written for experts, not users.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Jargon without explanation excludes the users who need help most; documentation must assume the minimum viable context.

failure-mode.description: No help exists at the point of confusion — only a footer link to a help center.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Users who encounter confusion mid-task need help in context, not after navigating away and losing their progress.
